heading: Payment of small shipping charges
label: 8507 Payment of small shipping charges
text: Upon receipt of a proper claim for such property under the provisions of this subchapter the Secretary is hereby authorized, in the Secretary’s discretion and in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary, to pay mailing or shipping charges not to exceed $25 in the case of each deceased veteran as hereinabove defined.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 5207 of this titlesubstituted “Secretary” for “Administrator” in two places and “Secretary’s” for “Administrator’s”.Pub. L. 102–831986— substituted “the Administrator’s” for “his” and “prescribed by the Administrator” for “by him promulgated”.Pub. L. 99–576
